calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order

REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2025 Continued To Apr-16-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Oct-12-2012 is admitted to probate. Christopher David Alafi is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed Probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-17-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cabrera. Not Reported.
